## What problem are you trying to solve

<!-- Describe the underlying problem. "I want feature X" tells us less than "I keep running into Y." -->

## What would you like AccessibleName to do

<!-- Be specific. UI sketch, example output, sample page, anything concrete. -->

## Scope check

AccessibleName is a *name inspector*, not a full accessibility scanner. We intentionally don't compete with axe DevTools or Lighthouse on colour contrast, heading order, ARIA validity, etc.

- [ ] My request is about accessible-name computation, reporting, or coverage across frames/shadow DOM
- [ ] My request might fit better in axe DevTools or another existing tool

If you ticked the second box, that's fine — open the issue anyway and we'll discuss whether it's in scope.

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- ANDI, axe DevTools, the Firefox accessibility inspector, etc. What's missing from them? -->
